title: Legal Query Assistant (RAG-based)
description: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that answers legal queries by retrieving relevant legal documents and generating contextual responses.
details: Built a RAG-based legal assistant that processes user queries and retrieves relevant legal information from a document corpus using vector embeddings and semantic search. Retrieved documents are passed to a language model to generate accurate and context-aware answers. The system combines document retrieval with generative AI to provide reliable responses grounded in legal sources.

title: YouTube Video Summarizer
description: An NLP-based tool that generates concise summaries of YouTube videos by extracting transcripts and applying automatic text summarization.
details: Built a Python pipeline that retrieves video transcripts using the YouTube Transcript API, preprocesses the text, and applies NLP summarization techniques to generate concise summaries of long videos. The system helps users quickly understand video content without watching the entire video.

title: Goodreads Emotional Intelligence Engine
description: A transformer-based NLP system that analyzes Goodreads book reviews to uncover nuanced emotional patterns beyond numeric star ratings.
details: Built an emotion-aware NLP pipeline using a GoEmotions-based DistilRoBERTa transformer to classify review emotions such as joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise, disgust, and neutral. Aggregated review-level predictions into book-level emotional fingerprints, analyzed rating–emotion mismatches, and tracked temporal emotion trends across large-scale review data. The project demonstrates how transformer-based emotion analysis provides deeper behavioral insights into reader perception than traditional sentiment analysis.

title: Fashion-MNIST Neural Network from Scratch
description: Implemented a fully connected neural network for Fashion-MNIST image classification entirely from scratch using NumPy — no TensorFlow or PyTorch.
details: Built core deep learning components manually including forward and backward propagation, ReLU and Softmax activations, dropout, L2 regularization, mini-batch training, Adam optimizer, early stopping, and gradient clipping.

title: Webpage to PDF Converter (Dynamic Title & Filename)
description: A Python tool that extracts readable content from any webpage and converts it into a clean, formatted PDF file automatically.
details: Uses trafilatura to extract the main article text while ignoring ads and navigation clutter, then formats it into a structured PDF using ReportLab. The script dynamically generates the PDF filename and title from the webpage URL and formats the extracted content into readable paragraphs.

title: Diabetes Prediction Challenge
description: Machine learning project that predicts the probability of diabetes using medical and demographic indicators from a Kaggle dataset.
details: Performed exploratory data analysis, feature preprocessing, and trained multiple classification models to predict diabetes risk. Evaluated models using metrics such as accuracy and ROC-AUC and optimized performance through feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning. Implemented the full ML workflow including data cleaning, model training, validation, and Kaggle submission generation.

title: Heart Disease Prediction
description: Machine learning project that predicts the likelihood of heart disease using patient medical and diagnostic features.
details: Built a predictive machine learning model using clinical attributes such as age, cholesterol levels, blood pressure, and chest pain type to determine the presence of heart disease. Performed data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, feature selection, and trained multiple classification models to compare performance. Evaluated models using metrics like accuracy, confusion matrix, and ROC-AUC to identify the most reliable prediction approach.

title: Google Play Store Analytics using PySpark
description: Big data analytics project that analyzes Google Play Store applications using PySpark and SparkSQL.
details: Built a PySpark-based analytics pipeline to process and analyze the Google Play Store apps dataset. Performed large-scale data cleaning, duplicate detection, datatype conversion, and feature exploration using Spark DataFrames and SparkSQL queries. Generated insights about app ratings, categories, installs, and pricing trends, demonstrating scalable data processing with Apache Spark.

title: TabNet for Tabular Data Classification
description: Explored TabNet, a deep learning architecture designed for tabular data, by applying it to the Binary Classification with a Bank Dataset competition on Kaggle.
details: Implemented and fine-tuned a TabNet model leveraging sequential attention for feature selection. Achieved 0.95518 accuracy and ranked 2012 on the leaderboard.

title: YouTube Spam Comment Detection
description: Developed a machine learning model to identify and filter spam comments on YouTube videos.
details: Used Bernoulli Naïve Bayes to classify YouTube comments and automated spam filtering by embedding the model into a web application.

title: Loan Approval Prediction
description: Developed a predictive model to determine loan approval likelihood based on applicant financial and demographic data.
details: Applied feature engineering and model tuning to improve accuracy and compared Logistic Regression, Decision Trees, and Random Forest classifiers.

title: Titanic Survival Prediction
description: Built a classification model to predict survival on the Titanic using passenger data.
details: Performed data cleaning and feature engineering such as extracting titles from names and calculating family size. Compared multiple classifiers and evaluated using cross-validation.

title: Adoption Survival Analysis in Animal Shelters
description: Performed survival analysis on animal shelter data to identify key factors affecting adoption rates.
details: Used Kaplan-Meier curves and multivariate Cox regression to understand how factors such as age, sex, and intake type influence adoption speed.

title: Sales Analysis Dashboard
description: Designed an interactive Power BI dashboard to analyze sales performance across regions and product categories.
details: Provides insights into revenue trends, customer segmentation, and key business drivers to support data-driven decision-making.

title: Cosmetic Product Segmentation
description: Built an interactive dashboard using R Shiny and ggplot2 to segment cosmetic products.
details: Categorized products based on age, gender and chemical composition to support targeted marketing strategies.

title: HerHaven - Women Community Forum
description: Built a React-based safety platform focused on women’s security including a community forum and emergency alert system.
details: Provides a supportive online space for sharing experiences and quick access to safety resources.

title: TenderHub
description: Created a cloud-based tender management application using Flask and AWS.
details: Admins can post tenders and manage vendors while vendors can submit bids and track their status.

title: Attrition Dashboard
description: Designed a Power BI dashboard to visualize employee attrition patterns.
details: Analyzed factors like job role, salary, work environment, and satisfaction to identify trends and retention strategies.
